transcript.text: Hello, May 8th, 2013 Daily Vlog. Today, right now it is 8.08 at night, it's just getting dark, so...

Like all I need to do, I know exactly how to do it, but it's so user-friendly.
AVS, dude. AVS, Video Converter.
I got Video Converter, Video Editor, like Sound Editor, Sound Converter, like Photo Editor and Converter and all this stuff.

I can't remember what it's called.
I'll look at it later on.

Today I was organizing, organizing, organizing.
